title: Tangy Crispy Croatian Chicken Skewers
description: A crowd-pleasing, keto-friendly Croatian dish featuring juicy, tangy chicken marinated in lemon, garlic, and herbs, then grilled to crispy perfection.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 220°C (428°F) or prepare a grill for medium-high heat.
Whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, minced garlic, smoked paprika, oregano, sea salt, black pepper, red pepper flakes, and melted butter in a bowl.
Cut the chicken breast into 1.5‑inch cubes and place them in the bowl, tossing to coat evenly. Let the chicken marinate for 30 minutes (you can prep ahead and refrigerate).
If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
Thread the marinated chicken cubes onto the skewers in an alternating pattern.

Arrange the skewers on a baking sheet or directly on the grill and roast for 15–18 minutes, turning once, until the chicken is cooked through and the edges are crisp (internal temperature should reach 74°C / 165°F).
Remove from heat and let the skewers rest for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving and enjoy hot.
